content.json:
## Application Gateway Troubleshooting Dashboard

Use this workbook to investigate Application Gateway access logs, identify errors, and drill down into specific requests by rule, listener, backend pool, and more.

parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.label: Log Analytics Workspace
parameters.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| order by name asc
| project id, label = name, selected = false, group = resourceGroup

parameters.name: ApplicationGateway
parameters.label: Application Gateway
parameters.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| distinct Resource
| order by Resource asc
| project value = Resource, label = Resource

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.label: Rule Name
parameters.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where isnotempty(ruleName_s)
| distinct ruleName_s
| order by ruleName_s asc
| project value = ruleName_s, label = ruleName_s

parameters.name: ListenerName
parameters.label: Listener Name
parameters.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where isnotempty(listenerName_s)
| distinct listenerName_s
| order by listenerName_s asc
| project value = listenerName_s, label = listenerName_s

parameters.name: BackendPool
parameters.label: Backend Pool
parameters.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where isnotempty(backendPoolName_s)
| distinct backendPoolName_s
| order by backendPoolName_s asc
| project value = backendPoolName_s, label = backendPoolName_s

parameters.name: ErrorInfo
parameters.label: Error Info
parameters.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where isnotempty(error_info_s)
| distinct error_info_s
| order by error_info_s asc
| project value = error_info_s, label = error_info_s

parameters.name: HttpStatus
parameters.label: HTTP Status
parameters.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| extend StatusCode = tostring(toint(httpStatus_d))
| distinct StatusCode
| order by StatusCode asc
| project value = StatusCode, label = StatusCode

content.json:
### Overview
High-level summary of Application Gateway traffic and errors for the selected filters.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize
    TotalRequests = count(),
    FailedRequests = countif(httpStatus_d >= 400),
    AvgLatencyMs = round(avg(timeTaken_d), 2),
    P95LatencyMs = round(percentile(timeTaken_d, 95), 2),
    UniqueClients = dcount(clientIP_s),
    TotalSentMB = round(sum(sentBytes_d) / 1048576.0, 2),
    TotalReceivedMB = round(sum(receivedBytes_d) / 1048576.0, 2)
| project Metric = pack_array('Total Requests', 'Failed Requests', 'Avg Latency (ms)', 'P95 Latency (ms)', 'Unique Clients', 'Sent (MB)', 'Received (MB)'), Value = pack_array(TotalRequests, FailedRequests, AvgLatencyMs, P95LatencyMs, UniqueClients, TotalSentMB, TotalReceivedMB)
| mv-expand Metric to typeof(string), Value to typeof(real)
content.title: Key Metrics

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), StatusCategory = case(
    httpStatus_d < 300, '2xx Success',
    httpStatus_d < 400, '3xx Redirect',
    httpStatus_d < 500, '4xx Client Error',
    '5xx Server Error')
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Request Volume by Status Category

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize Requests = count(), Errors = countif(httpStatus_d >= 400), ErrorRate = round(100.0 * countif(httpStatus_d >= 400) / count(), 2) by Resource
| order by Errors desc
content.title: Requests by Application Gateway

content.json:
### Error Analysis
Breakdown of errors by type, HTTP status, rule, and listener to help pinpoint the source of failures.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| where httpStatus_d >= 400 or (isnotempty(error_info_s) and error_info_s != 'NOERROR')
| summarize Count = count() by ErrorInfo = iif(isempty(error_info_s) or error_info_s == 'NOERROR', strcat('HTTP ', tostring(toint(httpStatus_d))), error_info_s)
| order by Count desc
content.title: Errors by Category

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| where httpStatus_d >= 400
| summarize Count = count() by HttpStatus = tostring(toint(httpStatus_d))
| order by Count desc
content.title: Errors by HTTP Status Code

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| where httpStatus_d >= 400 or (isnotempty(error_info_s) and error_info_s != 'NOERROR')
| summarize Errors = count() by ruleName_s, listenerName_s, error_info_s, HttpStatus = tostring(toint(httpStatus_d))
| order by Errors desc
| take 50
content.title: Top Errors by Rule and Listener

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| where httpStatus_d >= 400 or (isnotempty(error_info_s) and error_info_s != 'NOERROR')
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), error_info_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Errors Over Time

content.json:
### Backend Health
Analyze backend pool and server performance, including response times, status codes, and routing.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| where isnotempty(backendPoolName_s)
| summarize
    Requests = count(),
    Errors = countif(toint(serverStatus_s) >= 400 or toint(serverStatus_s) == 0),
    AvgServerLatencyMs = round(avg(todouble(serverResponseLatency_s)), 2),
    P95ServerLatencyMs = round(percentile(todouble(serverResponseLatency_s), 95), 2),
    AvgTimeTakenMs = round(avg(timeTaken_d), 2)
    by backendPoolName_s, backendSettingName_s
| order by Errors desc
content.title: Backend Pool Performance

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| where isnotempty(serverRouted_s)
| summarize
    Requests = count(),
    Errors = countif(toint(serverStatus_s) >= 400 or toint(serverStatus_s) == 0),
    AvgServerLatencyMs = round(avg(todouble(serverResponseLatency_s)), 2),
    P95ServerLatencyMs = round(percentile(todouble(serverResponseLatency_s), 95), 2)
    by serverRouted_s, ServerStatus = tostring(toint(serverStatus_s))
| order by Errors desc
| take 100
content.title: Requests by Backend Server

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| where isnotempty(serverRouted_s)
| summarize AvgLatency = avg(todouble(serverResponseLatency_s)) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), serverRouted_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Backend Server Latency Over Time

content.json:
### Request Details
Drill down into individual requests matching the selected filters. Use this to investigate specific incidents.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize Requests = count(), Errors = countif(httpStatus_d >= 400) by host_s, requestUri_s, httpMethod_s
| order by Errors desc, Requests desc
| take 50
content.title: Top Requested URIs

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize Requests = count(), Errors = countif(httpStatus_d >= 400), AvgLatencyMs = round(avg(timeTaken_d), 2) by clientIP_s
| order by Errors desc, Requests desc
| take 50
content.title: Top Client IPs

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Resource,
    clientIP_s,
    httpMethod_s,
    requestUri_s,
    HttpStatus = toint(httpStatus_d),
    ServerStatus = toint(serverStatus_s),
    timeTaken_d,
    serverResponseLatency_s,
    ruleName_s,
    listenerName_s,
    backendPoolName_s,
    serverRouted_s,
    error_info_s,
    sslEnabled_s,
    host_s,
    userAgent_s,
    clientPort_d,
    sentBytes_d,
    receivedBytes_d
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 250
content.title: Request Log (latest 250)

content.json:
### Timeline
Visualize traffic patterns, latency trends, and throughput over time.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize Requests = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Request Volume Over Time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize
    AvgLatency = avg(timeTaken_d),
    P50Latency = percentile(timeTaken_d, 50),
    P95Latency = percentile(timeTaken_d, 95),
    P99Latency = percentile(timeTaken_d, 99)
    by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Latency Percentiles Over Time (ms)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize
    SentMB = round(sum(sentBytes_d) / 1048576.0, 2),
    ReceivedMB = round(sum(receivedBytes_d) / 1048576.0, 2)
    by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Throughput Over Time (MB)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == 'ApplicationGatewayAccessLog'
| where '*' in ({ApplicationGateway}) or Resource in ({ApplicationGateway})
| where '*' in ({RuleName}) or ruleName_s in ({RuleName})
| where '*' in ({ListenerName}) or listenerName_s in ({ListenerName})
| where '*' in ({BackendPool}) or backendPoolName_s in ({BackendPool})
| where '*' in ({ErrorInfo}) or error_info_s in ({ErrorInfo})
| where '*' in ({HttpStatus}) or tostring(toint(httpStatus_d)) in ({HttpStatus})
| summarize Requests = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), listenerName_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Requests by Listener Over Time
